100101.english: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, to the saints which are at Ephesus, and to the faithful in Christ Jesus:
100101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᎡᏈᏌ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ,
100101.phonetic: Quo-la, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsa-da-nv-ti E-qui-sa i-tse-hi, a-le e-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa,

100102.english: Grace be to you, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.
100102.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
100102.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsa-tse-li ge-se-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

100103.english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings in heavenly places in Christ:
100103.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏦᏒ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
100103.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le U-do-da U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi o-s-dv i-ga-dv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, i-gi-ne-lv-hi ni-ga-v o-s-dv ge-sv a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv tso-sv e-hi u-gv-wa-li.

100104.english: According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love:
100104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎦᏑᏰᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᏏ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᏙᏢᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏁᎫᎢᏍᏛᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
100104.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya i-ga-su-ye-sv na-s-gi na a-gv-di-s-gv-i a-si e-lo-hi na-do-tlv-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ni-di-s-ga-nv-na i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le go-hu-s-di ne-gu-i-s-dv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi a-ga-ta-hv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-dv-di-s-gv-i;

100105.english: Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will,
100105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏑᏰᏐᎢ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100105.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-ga-su-ye-so-i tsu-we-tsi i-gv-ne-di-yi a-gv-di-s-gv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi-ya o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i.

100106.english: To the praise of the glory of his grace, wherein he hath made us accepted in the beloved.
100106.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎿ ᎭᎢᎩᏙᎵᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ;
100106.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, na-hna i-gi-do-li-tsv-hi tsi-gi na-s-gi a-tsi-ge-yu-i i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv;

100107.english: In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace;
100107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎡᎦᎫᏴᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ, ᎡᎩᏙᎵᏨᎯ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏧᏈᏍᏛ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100107.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv e-ga-gu-yv-dv tsi-gi u-gi-gv gv-ta-nv-hi, e-gi-do-li-tsv-hi i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-tsu-qui-s-dv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i;

100108.english: Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence;
100108.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎦᏙᎮᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100108.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tsa-ti i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi gv-di-s-gv ni-ga-v a-ga-do-he-hi-s-di ge-sv a-le a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i;

100109.english: Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself:
100109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100109.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-hi tsi-gi u-de-li-dv u-da-nv-te-lv-hi, na-s-gi-ya o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv-i, na-s-gi u-wa-sv ge-sv u-da-nv-te-lv-hi ge-sv-i;

100110.english: That in the dispensation of the fullness of times he might gather together in one all things in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; even in him:
100110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸᎭ ᏧᏪᏟᏐᏗᏱ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᎦᎸᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏤᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗ,
100110.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hi-yu a-se-lv-hi ge-sv a-li-ye-i-lo-lv-ha tsu-we-tli-so-di-yi sa-quo i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-yo-hi-se-di ga-lv-lo-hi a-le na-s-quo e-lo-hi tse-ha; na-s-gi tsu-yo-hi-se-di,

100111.english: In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the purpose of him who worketh all things after the counsel of his own will:
100111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎡᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᏅᏛ ᏚᏭᎪᏔᏂᎸᎢ;
100111.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di e-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi i-ga-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i, e-ga-su-ye-dv tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-da-nv-te-lv-i, na-s-gi na tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-s-gi-ya u-wa-sv u-da-nv-dv du-wu-go-ta-ni-lv-i;

100112.english: That we should be to the praise of his glory, who first trusted in Christ.
100112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎣᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏲᎬᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100112.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-yv i-gv-yi-yi o-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yo-gv-ni-so-di-yi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i;

100113.english: In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that holy Spirit of promise,
100113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ [ᏤᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ] ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏅ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏔᏅᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,
100113.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-hi na-s-quo [tse-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv-gi] hna-quo i-tsa-dv-ga-nv ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ka-no-he-dv, na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di tsi-gi; na-s-gi na-s-quo e-tso-i-yu-nv, hna-quo i-tsi-ye-lv-ta-nv-gi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do na-s-gi a-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i,

100114.english: Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the praise of his glory.
100114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏘᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᏂᏛᏁᎸᎭ ᎠᎫᏴᏛ ᎠᏩᏒᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100114.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-ga-ti-di-s-do-di tsi-gi i-ga-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i, gv-ni i-ga-tse-li-ga ni-dv-ne-lv-ha a-gu-yv-dv a-wa-sv-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.

100115.english: Wherefore I also, after I heard of your faith in the Lord Jesus, and love unto all the saints,
100115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ,
100115.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo a-yv a-qua-dv-ga-nv e-tso-i-yu-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, a-le de-tsi-ge-yu-sv na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti,

100116.english: Cease not to give thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers;
100116.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏑᎵᎪᎪ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎲ ᏂᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
100116.phonetic: V-tla yi-tsi-su-li-go-go [U-ne-la-nv-hi] tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse-hv ni-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i, ni-hi i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i;

100117.english: That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give unto you the spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him:
100117.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ;
100117.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi, i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, A-ga-yv-li-ge ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-gi, na-s-gi i-tsi-ne-di-yi a-da-nv-do a-ga-do-v-hi-s-do-di a-le a-da-na-nu-go-wi-se-hi, na-s-gi u-wa-sv e-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi;

100118.english: The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,
100118.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎧᏅ ᎢᎦ ᏤᏣᏗᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ,
100118.phonetic: Na-s-gi na i-tso-li-s-do-di ge-sv da-ka-nv-i-ga tse-tsa-di-s-da-ne-di-yi; na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi nu-s-dv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv, na-s-gi u-da-ya-nv-di ge-sv-i, a-le ni-ga-v ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-na-da-nv-ti u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv na-s-gi tsu-ne-di tsi-gi,

100119.english: And what is the exceeding greatness of his power to usward who believe, according to the working of his mighty power,
100119.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎷᏂᎬᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎸ ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ,
100119.phonetic: A-le nu-s-dv wu-da-go-na-dv-dv e-quo-hi-yu ge-sv u-lu-ni-gv-gv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-lv i-go-hi-yu-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i,

100120.english: Which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set him at his own right hand in the heavenly places,
100120.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏄᏛ'ᏁᎴᎢ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏥᏚᎴᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᏧᏪᎧᏁᎢ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ,
100120.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-nu-dv'ne-le-i u-yo-hu-sv tsi-du-le-ta-ne-i, a-le u-wa-sv a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv tsu-we-ka-ne-i ga-lv-la-di di-ge-sv-i,

100121.english: Far above all principality, and power, and might, and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this world, but also in that which is to come:
100121.cherokee: ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᎦᎨᏅᏴ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᏎᏕᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᎾᏙᎠᏗᏒ ᏗᎪᎥᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎠᏏ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ,
100121.phonetic: U-tli ga-lv-la-di-yu e-s-ga-quo na-ni-v di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le ge-ga-ge-nv-yv ge-sv-i, a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-se-de-gi ge-sv-i, a-le na-ni-v du-na-do-a-di-sv di-go-v-hi tsi-gi, v-tla a-ni-quo u-wa-sv go-hi tsi-gi, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni na-hna-ni a-si u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di tsi-gi,

100122.english: And hath put all things under his feet, and gave him to be the head over all things to the church,
100122.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏚᎳᏍᎬ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏥᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᎾᎬᏁᎸ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ,
100122.phonetic: A-le nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di du-la-s-gv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv tsi-ni-du-wa-ne-lv, a-le na-s-gi u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-na-gv-ne-lv nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv a-ne-hv-i,

100123.english: Which is his body, the fullness of him that filleth all in all.
100123.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎧᎵᎢᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎠᎧᎵᎢᎯ ᏥᎩ.
100123.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-ye-li tsi-gi, na-s-gi u-ka-li-i-hi, na-s-gi u-wa-sv ni-ga-di-yu ni-gv-na-dv a-ka-li-i-hi tsi-gi.

100201.english: And you hath he quickened, who were dead in trespasses and sins;
100201.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ;^
100201.phonetic: Ni-hi-no di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi tsi-ge-sv u-tsa-ti-ni ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv a-le i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i;^

100202.english: Wherein in time past ye walked according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience:
100202.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᎢᏤᏙᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎲ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ] ᎦᏃᎴᏍᎬ ᎡᎯ ᎡᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ;
100202.phonetic: Na-hna-ni tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv i-tse-do-lv-i na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv e-lo-hv a-ne-hi, na-s-gi-ya [u-du-li-s-gv] ga-no-le-s-gv e-hi e-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, na-s-gi a-da-nv-do go-hi ge-sv tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne du-na-da-nv-dv go-hi-yu-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv tsu-we-tsi;

100203.english: Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others.
100203.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎨᏓᎵᎪᏁᎲᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᎤᎬᎥᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏂᏓᏛᏁᎲᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏕᏅ ᏂᎦᏍᏛ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏄᎾᏍᏛᎢ.
100203.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv ni-di-v ge-da-li-go-ne-hv-gi na-hna i-gi-que-da-lv u-gv-v-s-gv-i, a-le u-que-da-lv a-le a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv u-na-du-li-s-gv ni-da-dv-ne-hv-gi; a-le di-ga-de-nv ni-ga-s-dv u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv tsu-we-tsi ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi-ya-quo a-ni-so-i nu-na-s-dv-i.

100204.english: But God, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us,
100204.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏩᏔᏁ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ,
100204.phonetic: A-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-hna-i-yu tsi-gi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge u-tsa-ti u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv tsu-wa-ta-ne a-yv i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu tsi-nu-li-s-ta-ne-i,

100205.english: Even when we were dead in sins, hath quickened us together with Christ, (by grace ye are saved;)
100205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎢᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᎦᏠᏯᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏂᏛᎢ, (ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᏅᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏔᏅ;)
100205.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi, i-gv-ni-dv i-ga-tlo-ya-s-ta-nv Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-ni-dv-i, (gv-wa-ga-ti-ya nv-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv e-tsi-s-de-lv-ta-nv;)

100206.english: And hath raised us up together, and made us sit together in heavenly places in Christ Jesus:
100206.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᎦᎴᎯᏐᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎦᏅᏗᏱ ᏂᎬᏁᎸ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏗᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ;
100206.phonetic: A-le i-tsu-la-ha de-ga-le-hi-so-ta-nv, a-le i-tsu-la-ha i-ga-nv-di-yi ni-gv-ne-lv ga-lv-la-di di-ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv;

100207.english: That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus.
100207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏭᏩᎫᏗᏗᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎲ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
100207.phonetic: Na-s-gi na wu-wa-gu-di-di-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi ni-ga-v u-we-hna-i-yu ge-sv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v o-s-dv ni-ga-dv-ne-hv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

100208.english: For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God:
100208.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ;
100208.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-ye-no u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv e-tsi-s-de-lv-do-ta-nv-hi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv gv-ta-nv-hi; a-le na-s-gi v-tla i-tsv-sv ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi; U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi;

100209.english: Not of works, lest any man should boast.
100209.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
100209.phonetic: V-tla di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv yi-gi, na-s-gi gi-lo u-tlv-qui-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

100210.english: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which God hath before ordained that we should walk in them.
100210.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎪᏢᏅᎯ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎡᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᏟ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎨᏓᏍᏗᏱ.
100210.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no a-yv i-go-tlv-nv-hi, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv e-go-tlv-nv-hi o-s-dv di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-tli na-hna i-ge-da-s-di-yi.

100211.english: Wherefore remember, that ye being in time past Gentiles in the flesh, who are called Uncircumcision by that which is called the Circumcision in the flesh made by hands;
100211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᎨᏦᏎᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᎪᏎᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏗᎪᏱ ᏗᎬᏔᏅᎯ;
100211.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-nv-te-s-di na-s-gi ni-hi tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv di-tsa-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-que-da-li ge-sv-i, ni-di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na ge-tso-se-lv-hi na-s-gi na di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ge-go-se-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi u-que-da-lv di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi di-go-yi di-gv-ta-nv-hi;

100212.english: That at that time ye were without Christ, being aliens from the commonwealth of Israel, and strangers from the covenants of promise, having no hope, and without God in the world:
100212.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏂᏤᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᏂᏤᎸᎾᏉ ᎨᏎ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᏃᏢᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎪᏁᎳ ᎨᏎ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ, ᎤᏚᎩ ᏂᏨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏤᎲᎾ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ.
100212.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hi-yu tsi-ge-se Ga-lo-ne-dv ni-tse-hv-na ge-se-i, ni-tse-lv-na-quo ge-se I-si-li a-ye-li u-no-tlv-sv-i, a-le i-tsi-go-ne-la ge-se ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv a-du-i-s-dv-i, u-du-gi ni-tsv-sv-na, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-tse-hv-na ge-se a-ni e-lo-hi.

100213.english: But now in Christ Jesus ye who sometimes were far off are made nigh by the blood of Christ.
100213.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᏂᎯ, ᎢᏅᎯᏳ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎩ, ᎾᎥ ᏕᏣᏘᏃᎸ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
100213.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, ni-hi, i-nv-hi-yu tsi-ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-gi, na-v de-tsa-ti-no-lv gv-ta-nv-hi u-gi-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv.

100214.english: For he is our peace, who hath made both one, and hath broken down the middle wall of partition between us;
100214.cherokee: ᎢᎪᎯᏍᏓᏁᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎢᏧᎳ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᎦᏓᏓᎴᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏐᏴᎢ;
100214.phonetic: I-go-hi-s-da-ne-hi-ye-no na-s-gi, i-tsu-la sa-quo-quo i-gv-ne-lv-hi, a-le u-yo-s-ta-nv-hi i-ga-da-da-le-di-s-gi a-so-yv-i;

100215.english: Having abolished in his flesh the enmity, even the law of commandments contained in ordinances; for to make in himself of twain one new man, so making peace;
100215.cherokee: ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᏔᏅ ᏗᏓᏓᏍᎦᎩ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏯᏛᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏁᏨᎢ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏤ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏬᏢᏗᏱ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏙᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ;
100215.phonetic: U-que-da-lv gv-di-s-gv u-dv-ta-nv di-da-da-s-ga-gi i-gv-ne-hi, na-s-gi ya-dv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-li-ne-tsv-i tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-ya-dv-ne-li-da-s-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi a-ni-ta-li ge-sv sa-quo i-tse yv-wi u-wo-tlv-di-yi u-wa-sv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi, na-s-gi-no do-hi i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi;

100216.english: And that he might reconcile both unto God in one body by the cross, having slain the enmity thereby:
100216.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎢᏧᎳ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏄᎾᏛᏅ ᏙᎯᏱ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎤᏮᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏮᏔᏅ ᎤᎸ ᏓᎾᏓᏍᎦᎬᎢ.
100216.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi i-tsu-la sa-quo a-ye-lv nu-na-dv-nv do-hi-yi i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi, da-da-hna-wa-s-dv u-wv-do-di-yi, na-s-gi u-wv-ta-nv u-lv da-na-da-s-ga-gv-i.

100217.english: And came and preached peace to you which were afar off, and to them that were nigh.
100217.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎷᏤᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏥᏙᏁ ᎢᏥᏃᎯᎮᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᎯ ᎢᏥᏩᏛᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏅ ᎢᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ.
100217.phonetic: A-le u-lu-tse-i a-le u-li-tsi-do-ne i-tsi-no-hi-he-le na-s-gi do-hi i-tsi-wa-dv-e-hi ge-sv-i, ni-hi i-nv i-tsa-dv-hna-de-gi, a-le na-s-gi na na-v i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi.

100218.english: For through him we both have access by one Spirit unto the Father.
100218.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏧᎳ, ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏫᎦᏰᏗᎷᏤᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ.
100218.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv a-yv i-tsu-la, sa-quo A-da-nv-do gv-di, A-ga-yv-li-ge wi-ga-ye-di-lu-tse-di nu-li-s-ta-nv.

100219.english: Now therefore ye are no more strangers and foreigners, but fellowcitizens with the saints, and of the household of God;
100219.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏁᏣᏓᎴ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏤᏙᎯᏉ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᏓᏘᎾᎥ ᎢᏖᎳ;
100219.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di v-tla hna-quo ne-tsa-da-le, a-le i-tse-do-hi-quo yi-gi, u-na-da-nv-ti-s-gi-ni i-tsu-la-ha i-tse-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-da-ti-na-v i-te-la;

100220.english: And are built upon the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Jesus Christ himself being the chief corner stone;
100220.cherokee: ᎡᏣᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏥᏝᏅᎯ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎫᏍᏛᏔᏅᎯ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ Ꭰ'ᏅᎯ ᏅᏯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ;
100220.phonetic: E-tsa-ne-s-ge-hv-hi ge-sv e-tsi-tla-nv-hi ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi e-tsi-gu-s-dv-ta-nv-hi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-wa-sv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a'nv-hi nv-ya i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi;

100221.english: In whom all the building fitly framed together groweth unto an holy temple in the Lord:
100221.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᏓᏙᎵᎩ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᏛᏍᎪᎢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏱ ᎠᏝᏅᎯ;
100221.phonetic: Na-hna-ni ni-gv a-da-ne-lv o-s-dv di-da-do-li-gi i-gv-ne-lv-hi, a-dv-s-go-i ga-lv-quo-di a-da-ne-lv ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go U-gv-wi-yu-hi-yi a-tla-nv-hi;

100222.english: In whom ye also are builded together for an habitation of God through the Spirit.
100222.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏤᏣᏜᏓᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎡᏣᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ ᎡᏥᏝᏅᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
100222.phonetic: Na-hna-ni na-s-quo ni-hi tse-tsa-dla-s-ta-nv-hi e-tsa-ne-s-ge-hv-hi e-tsi-tla-nv-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-la-di-s-di-yi A-da-nv-do gv-di-s-gv-i.

100301.english: For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,
100301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᏥᏴᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎥᎩᏴᎩᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ^
100301.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-yv Quo-la tsi-yv-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-s-dv-di-s-gv v-gi-yv-gi-nv-hi ni-hi ge-sv di-tsa-da-le-nv-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i^

100302.english: If ye have heard of the dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to youward:
100302.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏗᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏁᎸᎢ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏨᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ;
100302.phonetic: I-yu-no ho-wa i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-di-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-yv v-gi-ne-lv-i na-hna di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi ni-hi o-s-dv i-tsv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi;

100303.english: How that by revelation he made known unto me the mystery; (as I wrote afore in few words,
100303.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᎧᏁᏨᎯ ᎬᏗ ᏥᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸ,
100303.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv nu-wa-ne-lv a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-gi u-de-li-dv ge-sv-i, ga-yu-la i-lv-s-gi i-ka-ne-tsv-hi gv-di tsi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv,

100304.english: Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of Christ)
100304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᎥᎭ ᏓᏦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᎪᎵᎬ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
100304.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-go-li-ye-v-ha da-tso-li-s-do-ta-ni go-li-gv u-de-li-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga;

100305.english: Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now revealed unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit;
100305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏁᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎪᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎨᎬᏁᎭ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ;
100305.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-we-gu-ta-nv-sv v-tla gv-ni-ge-sv i-ge-gv-ne-lv-hi yi-ge-se yv-wi tsu-ne-tsi, na-s-gi-ya go-hi gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-ge-gv-ne-ha tsu-tse-li ge-tsi-lv-quo-di ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi A-da-nv-do gv-di;

100306.english: That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel:
100306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ (ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ) ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏂᎨᎬᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ;
100306.phonetic: Na-s-gi (ka-no-he-s-gi) tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-tlo-yi-quo u-na-tse-li ni-ge-gv-ne-hv-i, a-le na-s-gi-quo a-ye-li a-ne-hi ge-sv-i, a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-di-s-gv u-du-i-s-ta-nv U-ne-la-di-s-di-s-gv-i, O-s-dv Ka-no-he-dv gv-ta-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi;

100307.english: Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power.
100307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᏴᏋᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏆᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏩᏄᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
100307.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna a-yv di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi a-yv-quv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-le-s-di ge-sv v-qua-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi gv-wa-nu-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

100308.english: Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ;
100308.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛ ᎠᏆᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᎩᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎸᎩ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎬᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ;
100308.phonetic: A-yv wu-da-go-na-dv-dv a-qua-s-di-ka-ni tsi-gi na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti ge-sv, hi-a na-s-gi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv v-gi-ne-lv, na-s-gi u-gv-wa-lv-gi a-qua-li-tsi-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv gv-go-li-ye-di ni-ge-sv-na u-we-hna-i-yu ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv;

100309.english: And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ:
100309.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏥᏴᏁᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏍᎦᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
100309.phonetic: A-le na-ni-v yv-wi gv-ni-ge-sv i-ga-tsi-yv-ne-di-yi nu-s-dv na-s-gi u-de-li-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv e-lo-hi nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv gv-s-ga-la-nv-hi tsi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi e-hv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-wo-tlv-nv-nv-hi tsi-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-di-s-gv-i;

100310.english: To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,
100310.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏩᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎨᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏧᎾᏁᏟᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ;
100310.phonetic: U-gv-wa-lv-gi na-s-gi go-hi ge-tsi-lv-quo-di ge-sv a-le tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv ga-lv-la-di-yu de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, u-ni-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi u-tsa-ti i-yu-da-le-gi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-do-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, ge-gv-di-s-gv tsu-na-ne-tli-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i;

100311.english: According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:
100311.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏅᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲᎾ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏣᎬᏗᏍᎨ ᏧᏓᏅᏖᎴᎢ;
100311.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya nv-tsu-da-le-nv-hv-na u-da-nv-te-lv-i, ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-sa u-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li tsa-gv-di-s-ge tsu-da-nv-te-le-i;

100312.english: In whom we have boldness and access with confidence by the faith of him.
100312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏂᏗᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᏗᎷᏤᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏗ ᎡᏓᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏙᎢᏳᏒᎢ.
100312.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv ni-di-na-ye-s-gv-na a-le ga-ye-di-lu-tse-di nu-li-s-ta-nv ta-li u-dv-di e-da-li-s-ga-s-do-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi e-do-i-yu-sv-i.

100313.english: Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory.
100313.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᏗᏥᏩᎾᎦᎶᎢᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏨᎩᎵᏲᏤᎲ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏨᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ.
100313.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha di-tsi-wa-na-ga-lo-i-s-di-yi-quo ni-ge-sv-na a-yv i-tsv-gi-li-yo-tse-hv i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-tsv-ne-hi tsi-gi.

100314.english: For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,
100314.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏕᏥᏯᎵᏂᏆᏅᏁᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏙᏓ,
100314.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha de-tsi-ya-li-ni-qua-nv-ne-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-do-da,

100315.english: Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named,
100315.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᎪᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᎶ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ,
100315.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-ge-go-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi na-ni-v si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i, ga-lv-lo a-le e-lo-hi a-ne-hi,

100316.english: That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man;
100316.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏮᏙᏗᏱ;
100316.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya u-we-hna-i-yu ge-sv ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-hv-i, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i U-da-nv-do u-wv-do-di-yi;

100317.english: That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love,
100317.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏣᎵᎾᏍᏕᏝᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᎵᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,
100317.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-ne-la-di-s-di-yi di-tsi-na-wi-yi go-hi-yu-di gv-do-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi ni-hi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv di-tsa-li-na-s-de-tla-di-s-ta-nv-hi a-le di-tsa-li-s-da-yi-di-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i,

100318.english: May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height;
100318.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎨᏦᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏯᏛᎥᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏅᎯᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎭᏫᏂᏴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛᎢ;
100318.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-hi a-le na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti ye-li-quo ge-tso-li-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi na-ya-dv-v-i a-le ni-ga-nv-hi-sv-i, a-le na-ha-wi-ni-yv-i, a-le ni-ga-dv-i;

100319.english: And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fullness of God.
100319.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎦᎶᏒᏍᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎧᎵᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
100319.phonetic: A-le i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv tsi-ga-lo-sv-s-di-ha, na-s-gi e-tsi-ka-li-i-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi ni-ga-dv a-ka-li-i U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

100320.english: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,
100320.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᏗᏔᏲᎯᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎠᏴ ᏕᎦᏓᏅᏛᎢ,
100320.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na ye-li-quo i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di tsi-gi, u-tsa-ti u-lo-sv-s-di i-ga-i i-di-ta-yo-hi-hv-i, a-le i-da-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya u-tlo-yi u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha a-yv de-ga-da-nv-dv-i,

100321.english: Unto him be glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen.
100321.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
100321.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-wa-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, ni-go-hi-lv de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.  E-me-nv.

100401.english: I therefore, the prisoner of the Lord, beseech you that ye walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called,
100401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏴᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎥᎩᏴᎩᏅᎯ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏯᏅᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ;
100401.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yv tsi-yv-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-gi-s-dv-di-s-gv v-gi-yv-gi-nv-hi, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha i-tsa-le-ni-da-s-di-yi na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv a-da-ya-nv-do-di ge-sv na-s-gi ni-hi e-tsi-ya-nv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi;

100402.english: With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love;
100402.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏗᏓᏕᎵᏎᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ;
100402.phonetic: I-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di u-tsa-ti u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i a-le u-da-nv-ti ge-sv-i, u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le u-ne-la-gi di-da-de-li-se-di ge-sv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv gv-di;

100403.english: Endeavouring to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.
100403.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏌᏉ ᏂᏕᏨᏅ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᏴᏛᎢ.
100403.phonetic: I-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi sa-quo ni-de-tsv-nv de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv de-tsa-da-ni-yv-dv-i.

100404.english: There is one body, and one Spirit, even as ye are called in one hope of your calling;
100404.cherokee: ᏌᏉ [ᎡᎭ] ᎠᏰᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᎲ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ;
100404.phonetic: Sa-quo [e-ha] a-ye-lv-i, a-le sa-quo A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi-ya sa-quo u-du-gi i-tsv-di-yi e-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi, na-s-gi e-tsi-ya-nv-hv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga;

100405.english: One Lord, one faith, one baptism,
100405.cherokee: ᏌᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏌᏉ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏌᏉ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100405.phonetic: Sa-quo U-gv-wi-yu-hi, sa-quo go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i, sa-quo di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv-i;

100406.english: One God and Father of all, who is above all, and through all, and in you all.
100406.cherokee: ᏌᏉ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒ ᏥᏚᏰᎵᏏᏕᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏥᏥᏯᎠ.
100406.phonetic: Sa-quo na-ni-v U-na-ne-la-nv-hi a-le U-ni-do-da, na-s-gi na-ni-v u-na-tse-li u-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-le ni-ga-v de-ge-sa-di-sv tsi-du-ye-li-si-de-ga, a-le ni-hi ni-tsi-v tsi-tsi-ya-a.

100407.english: But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ.
100407.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎡᎩᏁᎸ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏟᎶᎥ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100407.phonetic: A-se-no ni-di-v i-di-si-yv-wi-ha e-gi-ne-lv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya a-tli-lo-v Ga-lo-ne-dv u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

100408.english: Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men.
100408.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏚᎴᏅᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏭᎶᏒ, ᏚᏴᎩᏁ ᏗᎨᏥᏴᎩᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100408.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Na-hi-yu du-le-nv-ga-lv-la-di wu-lo-sv, du-yv-gi-ne di-ge-tsi-yv-gi-nv-hi, a-le du-ne-le yv-wi u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

100409.english: (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth?
100409.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᎴᏅᎯ ᏣᏗᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏠᎠᏒ ᎡᎳᏗᏢ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎷᏨ ᏂᎦᏛᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ?
100409.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-le-nv-hi tsa-di-ha, ga-do ga-dv-ga, i-yu-no i-gv-yi-yi na-s-quo tsu-tlo-a-sv e-la-di-tlv de-ge-sa-di-sv e-lo-hi u-lu-tsv ni-ga-dv-gv-na yi-gi?

100410.english: He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might fill all things.)
100410.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏨᏧᏠᎠᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏚᎴᏁᎢ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒ ᏥᏭᎷᏤᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ.
100410.phonetic: Na-s-gi na tsv-tsu-tlo-a-se-i na-s-gi-quo na-s-quo tsi-du-le-ne-i ga-lv-la-di-tlv ni-ga-v ga-lv-lo-i de-ge-sa-di-sv tsi-wu-lu-tse-i, na-s-gi tsu-ka-li-i-s-di-yi ni-ga-v nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di.

100411.english: And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;
100411.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏚᏪᎧᏁᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ, ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ, ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᏂᏙᎯ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ, ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ;
100411.phonetic: I-ga-dv-no ge-tsi-nv-si-dv du-we-ka-ne-i; i-ga-dv-no, a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi; i-ga-dv-no, a-na-li-tsi-do-ni-do-hi; i-ga-dv-no, di-ni-ga-ti-ya a-le di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi;

100412.english: For the perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ:
100412.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎪᎸᎾ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎵᏥᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᎾᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ;
100412.phonetic: Nu-ni-go-lv-na i-ge-gv-ne-di-yi u-na-da-nv-ti, a-li-tsi-do-di ge-sv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ye-lv u-na-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi;

100413.english: Till we all come in the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of God, unto a perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ:
100413.cherokee: ᎬᏂ ᏂᏗᎥ ᏫᏗᏱᎶᎸᎭ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎡᏙᎯᏳᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏗᎦᏔᎲᎢ^ᏗᎦᏛᎾᏯ ᎢᏗᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ^ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎠᏟᎶᎥ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ;
100413.phonetic: Gv-ni ni-di-v wi-di-yi-lo-lv-ha sa-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi e-do-hi-yu-sv-i a-le e-di-ga-ta-hv-i^di-ga-dv-na-ya i-di-s-ga-ya i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi^a-ka-li-i a-tli-lo-v Ga-lo-ne-dv ni-ga-dv i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi;

100414.english: That we henceforth be no more children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men, and cunning craftiness, whereby they lie in wait to deceive;
100414.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏗᏲᎵ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎢᎩᏃᎸᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏃᎸᏔᏂᏙᎲᎢ, ᎤᎾᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᏂᏏᎾᏌᏅ ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏴ ᎤᎾᏓᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ;
100414.phonetic: Na-s-gi go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv hna-quo di-di-yo-li ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, i-gi-no-lv-ta-ni-da-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ni-ga-v-quo di-de-yo-di ge-sv ga-no-lv-ta-ni-do-hv-i, u-na-da-li-da-s-di-yu ge-sv yv-wi, a-ni-si-na-sa-nv a-ni-ga-ti-yv u-na-da-lo-nu-he-di-yi;

100415.english: But speaking the truth in love, may grow up into him in all things, which is the head, even Christ:
100415.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏗᎦᏛᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ;
100415.phonetic: Du-yu-go-dv-s-gi-ni ka-ne-i-s-di ge-sv i-dv-di-s-gv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv ta-li i-dv-di-s-gv-i, di-ga-dv-hi-s-di-yi na-s-gi ni-ga-v nu-da-le-sv na-s-gi di-ga-du-da-de-wi-s-di-yi na-s-gi a-s-go-li tsi-gi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv;

100416.english: From whom the whole body fitly joined together and compacted by that which every joint supplieth, according to the effectual working in the measure of every part, maketh increase of the body unto the edifying of itself in love.
100416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᏙᎵᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏚᏓᏕᏫᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᎯᏢᎾᎥ ᏥᏚᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏟᎶᎥ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎧᏁᏉᏍᎪ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ, ᎠᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100416.phonetic: Na-s-gi ge-sv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga ni-gv a-ye-lv o-s-dv di-do-li-gi tsi-gi, a-le tsi-du-du-da-de-wi-s-di ni-ga-v du-hi-tlv-na-v tsi-du-li-s-de-lv-do-di, na-s-gi-ya a-tli-lo-v tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi tsu-da-tse-li-dv de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, ka-ne-quo-s-go a-ye-lv-i, a-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-go u-wa-sv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i.

100417.english: This I say therefore, and testify in the Lord, that ye henceforth walk not as other Gentiles walk, in the vanity of their mind,
100417.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎬᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏤᎲ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎫᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᏓᏩᏗᏒᎢ,
100417.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, a-le i-tsv-ne-tse-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-do-v gv-di-ha, na-s-gi ni-hi go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv i-tse-hv tle-s-di a-ni-so-i tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv a-ne-hv na-s-gi-ya yi-nu-s-de-s-di, na-s-gi u-ne-gu-hi-yu ge-sv du-na-da-nv-dv a-ni-s-da-wa-di-sv-i,

100418.english: Having the understanding darkened, being alienated from the life of God through the ignorance that is in them, because of the blindness of their heart:
100418.cherokee: ᎤᏃᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᎵᏏᎲᏎᎸᎯ, ᎤᎾᏞᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᏗᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100418.phonetic: U-no-li-s-di-yi tsu-na-li-si-hv-se-lv-hi, u-na-tle-dv na-hna U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv a-le-ni-da-s-di-yi, na-s-gi na-ni-ga-ta-na-v-na ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv tsu-ni-na-wi di-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv-i.

100419.english: Who being past feeling have given themselves over unto lasciviousness, to work all uncleanness with greediness.
100419.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ ᏚᎾᏓᏲᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᏐᏢᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ.
100419.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-wa-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-na-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i du-na-da-yo-sv u-na-li-so-tlv-i-s-do-di-yi, nu-da-le-sv ga-da-ha ge-sv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ni-gv-v-s-gv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv.

100420.english: But ye have not so learned Christ;
100420.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᏰᏣᏕᎶᏆᎡᎸ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ,
100420.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni v-tla na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di ye-tsa-de-lo-qua-e-lv Ga-lo-ne-dv,

100421.english: If so be that ye have heard him, and have been taught by him, as the truth is in Jesus:
100421.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᎡᏣᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤᏲᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎤᏪᎲ ᏥᏌ;
100421.phonetic: I-yu-no ho-wa e-tsa-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di, a-le na-s-gi i-tse-yo-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv du-yu-go-dv u-we-hv Tsi-sa;

100422.english: That ye put off concerning the former conversation the old man, which is corrupt according to the deceitful lusts;
100422.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎸ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏘ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᏚᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100422.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-s-dv i-gv-yi-yi i-tsa-le-ni-do-lv u-gv-wa-li i-yv-dv i-tsv-ne-di-yi u-we-ti yv-wi na-s-gi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-da-li-da-s-di a-du-lv-nv-di ge-sv-i;

100423.english: And be renewed in the spirit of your mind;

100424.english: And that ye put on the new man, which after God is created in righteousness and true holiness.
100424.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100424.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-tse yv-wi i-tsa-nu-wo-s-di-yi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi go-tlv-nv-hi tsi-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-do-hi-yu-sv a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

100425.english: Wherefore putting away lying, speak every man truth with his neighbour: for we are members one of another.
100425.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏨᏁᎲ ᎠᏥᎪᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏁᏤᎲ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏣᏓᎳ; ᏕᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᏰᏃ.
100425.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yv-dv ni-tsv-ne-hv a-tsi-go-di ge-sv-i, ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di de-tsa-da-ne-tse-hv na-v i-tsa-da-la; de-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv-ye-no.

100426.english: Be ye angry, and sin not: let not the sun go down upon your wrath:
100426.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏔᎳᏬᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᏅᎨᏍᏗ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏅᏙ ᏭᏕᎵᏨᎩ ᎨᏥᏔᎳᏬᏍᎩ;
100426.phonetic: I-tsi-ta-la-wo-s-ge-s-di, a-le tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-nv-ge-s-di; tle-s-di nv-do wu-de-li-tsv-gi ge-tsi-ta-la-wo-s-gi;

100427.english: Neither give place to the devil.

100428.english: Let him that stole steal no more: but rather let him labour, working with his hands the thing which is good, that he may have to give to him that needeth.
100428.cherokee: ᎤᏃᏍᎩᏛᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏳᏃᏍᎩᏎᏍᏗ; ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎬᏩᏁᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᏎᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100428.phonetic: U-no-s-gi-dv-no ge-sv tle-s-di hna-quo yu-no-s-gi-se-s-di; du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di-quo-s-gi-ni de-gv-di-s-ge-s-di tsu-wo-ye-ni o-s-dv ge-sv na-dv-ne-he-s-di, na-s-gi ga-gv-wa-ne-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi u-ni-gv-se-hi ge-sv-i.

100429.english: Let no corrupt communication proceed out of your mouth, but that which is good to the use of edifying, that it may minister grace unto the hearers.
100429.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᏗᏥᎰᎵ, ᎣᏍᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᎠ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎩ.
100429.phonetic: Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di u-yo ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-nu-go-tsv-gi di-tsi-ho-li, o-s-dv-s-gi-ni ge-sv u-wa-sv na-s-gi gv-wa-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi u-du-lv-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-a u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-di-yi a-na-dv-gi-s-gi.

100430.english: And grieve not the holy Spirit of God, whereby ye are sealed unto the day of redemption.
100430.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏰᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎡᏧᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ.
100430.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di u-yo ye-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-di-s-ge-s-di Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi i-tsi-ye-lv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga e-tsu-da-le-s-di ge-sv a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha.

100431.english: Let all bitterness, and wrath, and anger, and clamour, and evil speaking, be put away from you, with all malice:
100431.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏓᏂᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᎾᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎿᎭᎸᎯ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎨᏒᎢ;
100431.phonetic: Ni-ga-v a-da-ni-qua-di-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le ka-na-lv-i-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-s-da-ya ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-hna-lv-hi ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, i-yv-dv i-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di i-tse-hv-i, u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di ni-ga-v u-so-nv ge-sv-i;

100432.english: And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.
100432.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ, ᏕᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏍᎦᏅᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏥᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
100432.phonetic: A-le di-tsa-da-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-se-s-di, i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di di-tsi-na-wi-yi, de-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di de-tsa-da-s-ga-nv-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-ge-tsi-ne-lv i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

100501.english: Be ye therefore followers of God, as dear children;
100501.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎨᏳᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ;
100501.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi e-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi ge-se-s-di na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv tsu-ge-yu-hi tsu-we-tsi;

100502.english: And walk in love, as Christ also hath loved us, and hath given himself for us an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweet smelling savour.
100502.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏕᎦᏓᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎴᏗ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎦᎾᏍᏛ ᎤᏪᏩᏒᎢᏍᏗ.
100502.phonetic: A-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-he-s-di i-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo Ga-lo-ne-dv i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-le tsi-de-ga-da-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, a-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di a-le a-tsi-lv ge-le-di tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ga-na-s-dv u-we-wa-sv-i-s-di.

100503.english: But fornication, and all uncleanness, or covetousness, let it not be once named among you, as becometh saints;
100503.cherokee: ᎡᏕᎵᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏉ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᏅ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎵᎶᎲᏍᎦ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ;
100503.phonetic: E-de-li-dv-s-gi-ni di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, a-le nu-da-le-sv-quo ga-da-ha ge-sv-i, a-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, tle-s-di ka-ne-i-s-do-di u-nv yi-ge-se-s-di i-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi tsu-ni-li-lo-hv-s-ga u-na-da-nv-ti;

100504.english: Neither filthiness, nor foolish talking, nor jesting, which are not convenient: but rather giving of thanks.
100504.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎢᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᏁᏛ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏪᏢᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏃᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ; ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗᏱᏉᏍᎩᏂ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ.
100504.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le go-hu-s-di u-ne-i-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-li-s-ga-ne-dv ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le ga-we-tlv-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi no-sv-na tsi-gi; a-li-he-li-tse-di-yi-quo-s-gi-ni [U-ne-la-nv-hi] u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di.

100505.english: For this ye know, that no whoremonger, nor unclean person, nor covetous man, who is an idolater, hath any inheritance in the kingdom of Christ and of God.
100505.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᎲᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏓᎭᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᎬᎥᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏰᎸᎯ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤ ᎵᎪᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤ ᎵᎪᎯ.
100505.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi gi-lo u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-hv-s-gi, a-le a-ga-da-ha-i, a-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-gv-v-s-gi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ye-lv-hi a-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi ge-sv-i, u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-go-hi a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi.

100506.english: Let no man deceive you with vain words: for because of these things cometh the wrath of God upon the children of disobedience.
100506.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏥᎶᏄᎮᏔᏅᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ.
100506.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo i-tsi-lo-nu-he-ta-nv-gi go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-ne-la-nv-hi u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-ha go-hi-yu-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv tsu-we-tsi.

100507.english: Be not ye therefore partakers with them.
100507.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏣᏠᏯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᎵᏩᏛᎡᎲᎢ.
100507.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di ni-hi yi-tsa-tlo-ya-s-di-s-ge-s-di u-na-li-wa-dv-e-hv-i.

100508.english: For ye were sometimes darkness, but now are ye light in the Lord: walk as children of light:
100508.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎢᏤᎲᎩ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᎢᏤᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ; ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎤᏁᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᏙᎮᏍᏗ;
100508.phonetic: I-lv-hi-yu-ye-no tsi-ge-sv u-li-si-gv i-tse-hv-gi, go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-ga--ga-dv i-tse-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv; i-ga--ga-dv tsu-we-tsi u-ne-da-s-di ge-sv i-tse-do-he-s-di;

100509.english: (For the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth;)
100509.cherokee: (ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,)
100509.phonetic: (A-da-nv-do-ye-no ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-go ni-ga-v o-s-dv ge-sv a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv a-le ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i,)

100510.english: Proving what is acceptable unto the Lord.
100510.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
100510.phonetic: I-tsi-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

100511.english: And have no fellowship with the unfruitful works of darkness, but rather reprove them.
100511.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏣᎵᎪᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏕᏥᎬᏍᎪᎸᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ.
100511.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di yi-di-tsa-li-go-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na u-li-si-gi di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, de-tsi-gv-s-go-lv-v-s-ge-s-di-quo-s-gi-ni.

100512.english: For it is a shame even to speak of those things which are done of them in secret.
100512.cherokee: ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎤᏕᎵᏒᎢ.
100512.phonetic: U-de-ho-hi-s-di-yu-ye-no ka-ne-i-s-do-di-yi-quo na-s-quo na-s-gi na na-na-dv-ne-hv u-de-li-sv-i.

100513.english: But all things that are reproved are made manifest by the light: for whatsoever doth make manifest is light.
100513.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎬᏍᎪᎸᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᎬᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᎡ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ.
100513.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-gv-s-go-lv-nv-hi tsi-ge-so i-ga--ga-ti gv-di gv-ni-ge-e i-di-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-so-i; na-s-gi-ye-no gv-ni-ge-sv i-di-gv-ne-hi ge-sv na-s-gi i-ga--ga-ti.

100514.english: Wherefore he saith, Awake thou that sleepest, and arise from the dead, and Christ shall give thee light.
100514.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎯᏰᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎯᎵᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎴᎲᎦ ᎩᏯᏓᏅᏏ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎩᏯᏓᏑᏴᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏃ ᏓᏣᏁᎵ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ.
100514.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Hi-ye-gi ni-hi hi-li-hi, a-le ta-le-hv-ga gi-ya-da-nv-si tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi gi-ya-da-su-yv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv-no da-tsa-ne-li i-ga--ga-ti.

100515.english: See then that ye walk circumspectly, not as fools, but as wise,
100515.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏁᎫ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ, ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎾᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ,
100515.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di ni-ga-v du-yu-go-dv i-tsa-le-ni-da-s-di-yi, tle-s-di u-ni-ne-gu i-yu-na-dv-ne-di, a-ni-ga-ta-na-i-s-gi-ni i-yu-na-dv-ne-di,

100516.english: Redeeming the time, because the days are evil.
100516.cherokee: ᎢᏧᏓᎴᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏱᎵᏒᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100516.phonetic: I-tsu-da-le-s-ge-s-di go-hi ge-sv a-li-yi-li-sv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di u-yo-i-yu ge-sv go-hi ge-sv-i.

100517.english: Wherefore be ye not unwise, but understanding what the will of the Lord is.
100517.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏂᏦᎵᎬᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏦᎵᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏅᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
100517.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di ni-tso-li-gv-na yi-ge-se-s-di, i-tso-li-gi-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv Nv-gv-wi-yu-hi.

100518.english: And be not drunk with wine, wherein is excess; but be filled with the Spirit;
100518.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎦᎨ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᏥᎩ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᏬᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
100518.phonetic: Na-s-gi tle-s-di gi-ga-ge a-di-ta-s-di yi-di-tsi-yv-s-de-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-yo-i-yu tsi-gi; A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ka-li-wo-hi ge-se-s-di.

100519.english: Speaking to yourselves in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord;
100519.cherokee: ᏕᏣᎵᏃᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ, ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
100519.phonetic: De-tsa-li-no-he-s-ge-s-di de-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ka-no-gi-s-do-di, a-le ga-lv-quo-do-di di-ka-no-gi-s-di, a-le a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li di-ka-no-gi-s-di, de-tsi-no-gi-s-ge-s-di do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv di-da-le-hv-s-ge-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi de-tsi-no-gi-s-di-s-ge-s-di.

100520.english: Giving thanks always for all things unto God and the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ;
100520.cherokee: ᎡᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ;
100520.phonetic: E-tsa-li-e-li-tse-he-s-di ni-go-hi-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge-i nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di u-gv-wa-li, i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di du-do-v U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv;

100521.english: Submitting yourselves one to another in the fear of God.

100522.english: Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as unto the Lord.
100522.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎨᏴ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᏗᎨᏥᏰᎯ ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
100522.phonetic: I-tsi-ge-yv, i-tsv-sv di-ge-tsi-ye-hi de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di, U-gv-wi-yu-hi go-hi-yu-di tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya-i.

100523.english: For the husband is the head of the wife, even as Christ is the head of the church: and he is the saviour of the body.
100523.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏯᏰᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎡᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.
100523.phonetic: A-s-ga-ya-ye-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi u-da-li-i e-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv a-ne-hv-i; a-le na-s-gi A-s-de-li-s-gi a-ye-lv-i.

100524.english: Therefore as the church is subject unto Christ, so let the wives be to their own husbands in every thing.
100524.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏰᎯ ᏧᏃᎯᏳᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ [ᏂᎬᏩᏂᏪᏎᎲᎢ.]
100524.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-wo-hi-yu-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya a-ni-ge-yv di-gv-wa-ni-ye-hi tsu-no-hi-yu-di ni-ga-v [ni-gv-wa-ni-we-se-hv-i.]

100525.english: Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it;
100525.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ, ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᎵᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᎨᏳᏎ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏥᏚᏓᏲᏎᎢ,
100525.phonetic: I-tsi-s-ga-ya, de-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di di-tsa-da-li-i, na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-quo tsu-ge-yu-se tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i, a-le na-s-gi da-s-de-li-s-gv u-wa-sv tsi-du-da-yo-se-i,

100526.english: That he might sanctify and cleanse it with the washing of water by the word,
100526.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᏅᎦᎵᏍᎬᎢ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᎹ ᏥᎪᏑᎴᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
100526.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-ga-nv-na i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi ga-nv-ga-li-s-gv-i ka-no-he-dv gv-di-s-gv-i a-ma tsi-go-su-le-di-s-go na-s-gi-ya-i.

100527.english: That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.
100527.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᏪᎪᏗᏱ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ, ᏄᏚᏯᏍᏛᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᏁᎪᏳᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏄᏓᏓᎸᎾ; ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᎫᎢᏍᏛᎾ.
100527.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-wa-sv a-ga-ta-hv u-we-go-di-yi di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i, nu-du-ya-s-dv-na, a-le nu-da-ne-go-yu-sv-na, a-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di na-s-gi i-yu-s-di nu-da-da-lv-na; na-s-ga-nv-na-s-gi-ni i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-le go-hu-s-di na-gu-i-s-dv-na.

100528.english: So ought men to love their wives as their own bodies. He that loveth his wife loveth himself.
100528.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏗᏂᏰᎸ ᏂᏚᏂᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏂᏚᏂᎨᏳᎭ ᏧᎾᏓᎵᎢ.  ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᏧᎨᏳᏐ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏐᎢ.
100528.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya a-ni-s-ga-ya u-nv-sv di-ni-ye-lv ni-du-ni-ge-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya yi-ni-du-ni-ge-yu-ha tsu-na-da-li-i.  Gi-lo u-da-li-i tsu-ge-yu-so u-wa-sv u-da-ge-yu-so-i.

100529.english: For no man ever yet hated his own flesh; but nourisheth and cherisheth it, even as the Lord the church:
100529.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏏ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏳᏂᏆᏘᎶ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏇᏓᎸᎢ; ᎨᎶᎰᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏂᏓᏛᏁᎲ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ;
100529.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no gi-lo a-si i-lv-hi-yu yu-ni-qua-ti-lo u-wa-sv u-que-da-lv-i; ge-lo-ho-s-gi-ni a-le a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-go-i, na-s-gi-ya U-gv-wi-yu-hi ni-da-dv-ne-hv tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i;

100530.english: For we are members of his body, of his flesh, and of his bones.
100530.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏕᎦᏚᏓᏔ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎪᎳ.
100530.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no na-s-gi a-ye-lv de-ga-du-da-ta, na-s-gi u-que-da-lv a-le na-s-gi tsu-go-la.

100531.english: For this cause shall a man leave his father and mother, and shall be joined unto his wife, and they two shall be one flesh.
100531.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏕᎬᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᏜᏓᏩᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏃ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ.
100531.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya de-gv-de-ge-s-di u-do-da a-le u-tsi, a-dla-wa-s-di-s-ge-s-di-no u-da-li-i, na-s-gi-no a-ni-ta-li sa-quo-quo ge-se-s-di u-ni-que-da-lv-i.

100532.english: This is a great mystery: but I speak concerning Christ and the church.
100532.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏕᎵᏗᏳ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎦᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᎭ.
100532.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-de-li-di-yu; a-se-no Ga-lo-ne-dv a-le tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv ga-tsi-ne-i-s-di-ha.

100533.english: Nevertheless let every one of you in particular so love his wife even as himself; and the wife see that she reverence her husband.
100533.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎰᏩ ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᎵᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒᎢ; ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎤᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎯ.
100533.phonetic: A-di-na ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv ho-wa de-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di di-tsa-da-li-i na-s-gi-ya i-tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv-i; a-ge-yv-no u-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di u-ye-hi.

100601.english: Children, obey your parents in the Lord: for this is right.
100601.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏚᏳᎪᏗᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
100601.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-li, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di; du-yu-go-di-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a.

100602.english: Honour thy father and mother; (which is the first commandment with promise;)
100602.cherokee: ᎯᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᏣᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᏥᎩ ᏧᎵᏠᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ,
100602.phonetic: Hi-lv-quo-de-s-di tsa-do-da a-le tsa-tsi, na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi u-li-ne-tsv tsi-gi tsu-li-tlo-ya-s-di a-du-i-s-dv-i,

100603.english: That it may be well with thee, and thou mayest live long on the earth.
100603.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᎨᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎨᏣᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ.
100603.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-si-yu i-ge-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di yi-gi, a-le go-hi-di-yu ge-tsa-le-ni-da-s-di yi-gi e-lo-hi.

100604.english: And, ye fathers, provoke not your children to wrath: but bring them up in the nurture and admonition of the Lord.
100604.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᎿᎭᎸᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏤᏥ; ᏕᏣᏛᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏯᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100604.phonetic: A-le ni-hi i-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i, tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-hna-lv-s-di-s-ge-s-di di-tse-tsi; de-tsa-dv-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li di-de-yo-di ge-sv a-le ge-ya-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

100605.english: Servants, be obedient to them that are your masters according to the flesh, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as unto Christ;
100605.cherokee: ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ, ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎾᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏁᏣᏛᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
100605.phonetic: E-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-do-hi a-ni u-que-da-li, ge-sv-i, i-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di a-le de-tsi-na-wi-s-ge-s-di, o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-hi ge-se-s-di di-tsi-na-wi-yi, Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-ne-tsa-dv-ne-ho na-s-gi-ya-i.

100606.english: Not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but as the servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart;
100606.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏥᏛᏓᏗᎧᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏴᏫᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎪᎢ;
100606.phonetic: V-tla tsi-dv-da-di-ka-no i-yu-s-di, yv-wi-quo o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-di; Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni tsu-nv-si-da-s-di i-yu-na-dv-ne-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i, di-tsi-na-wi-yi tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-go-i;

100607.english: With good will doing service, as to the Lord, and not to men:
100607.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎲ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏁᏣᏛᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏴᏫᏉ ᏥᏂᏕᏣᏛᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ;
100607.phonetic: O-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-hi go-hu-s-di i-tsa-dv-ne-hv, U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsi-ne-tsa-dv-ne-ho na-s-gi-ya-i, v-tla-no yv-wi-quo tsi-ni-de-tsa-dv-ne-ho na-s-gi-ya-i;

100608.english: Knowing that whatsoever good thing any man doeth, the same shall he receive of the Lord, whether he be bond or free.
100608.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎩᎶᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏱᎩ.
100608.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di o-s-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv gi-lo-i, na-s-gi-ya i-yu-s-di u-ne-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi, na-s-quo a-tsi-na-tla-i yi-gi, a-le na-tsi-na-tla-v-na yi-gi.

100609.english: And, ye masters, do the same things unto them, forbearing threatening: knowing that your Master also is in heaven; neither is there respect of persons with him.
100609.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏕᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎢᏤᎵᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎾᏰᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎡᎲᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏚᏑᏰᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100609.phonetic: A-le ni-hi di-tsa-da-nv-si-do-hi, na-s-gi-ya u-tlo-yi na-s-gi ni-de-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di, u-ne-la-gi i-tse-li-se-s-di de-tsi-na-ye-da-ne-hv-i, tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ni-hi na-s-quo I-tsi-nv-si-do-hi ga-lv-lo-i e-hv-i; v-tla a-le yi-du-su-ye-s-di yv-wi di-gv-wa-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-i.

100610.english: Finally, my brethren, be strong in the Lord, and in the power of his might.
100610.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
100610.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no ge-sv-i, i-da-li-nv-tli, di-tsa-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-se-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-i, a-le i-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-dv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i.

100611.english: Put on the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.
100611.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙ ᎢᏣᏣᏅᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏣᎴᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎠᏏᎾᏌᏅ ᏕᏥᎦᏘᎸᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
100611.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga a-li-s-ga-s-do-do i-tsa-tsa-nv-da, na-s-gi ye-li ge-tsa-le-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-s-gi-na a-si-na-sa-nv de-tsi-ga-ti-lv-s-di-s-gv-i.

100612.english: For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world, against spiritual wickedness in high places.
100612.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏗᎦᏟᏴᎭ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ, ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏄᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ.
100612.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yi-di-ga-tli-yv-ha u-que-da-li ge-sv a-le gi-gv, u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni, a-le tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi a-ni e-lo-hi u-li-si-gi ge-sv-i, di-da-nv-do u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv ga-lv-lo nu-na-dv-hna-de-gv-i.

100613.english: Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.
100613.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎵ ᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᏗᎨᏣᏟᏴᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎨᏣᎴᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
100613.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-gi ni-ga-dv a-li s-ga-s-do-do U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi ye-li di-ge-tsa-tli-yv-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-hi-yu u-yo-i-yu i-ga ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-no ni-ga-dv i-tsa-dv-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di, ge-tsa-le-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

100614.english: Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness;
100614.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᏙᎨᏍᏗ, ᏕᏣᏓᏠᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏁᏣᏍᏚᎶᏕᏍᏗ;
100614.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-tsi-do-ge-s-di, de-tsa-da-tlo-s-de-s-di ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv de-tsa-da-ne-tsa-s-du-lo-de-s-di;

100615.english: And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace;
100615.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏕᏂᏃ ᏕᏣᎳᏑᎶᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ;
100615.phonetic: Di-tsa-la-si-de-ni-no de-tsa-la-su-lo-de-s-di a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi;

100616.english: Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.
100616.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᎵᎬᏑᎶᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎨᏨᏜᏓᏕᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏥᏍᏟ ᎦᏂ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.
100616.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-quo go-hi-yu-di ge-sv i-tsa-li-gv-su-lo-da, na-s-gi i-tsv-di-s-gv ye-li-quo di-ge-tsv-dla-de-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-tsi-s-tli ga-ni a-s-gi-na tsu-tse-li-ga.

100617.english: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God:
100617.cherokee: ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗᏃ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᎢᏥᎾᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏥᎩ;
100617.phonetic: A-li-s-de-lv-do-di-no a-li-s-du-lo i-tsi-na-gi, a-le a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv A-da-nv-do u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li tsi-gi;

100618.english: Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints;
100618.cherokee: ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏔᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏯᏪᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏔᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ.
100618.phonetic: Ni-go-hi-lv i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di nu-da-le-sv a-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv, a-le a-ta-yo-s-di ge-sv A-da-nv-do gv-di, a-le i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di na-hna-ni i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di di-ya-we-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na, a-le a-ta-yo-s-di ge-sv ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi u-na-da-nv-ti na-ni-v-i.

100619.english: And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel,
100619.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏆᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎩᏍᏚᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᎣᎵ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏁᎮᏛ;
100619.phonetic: A-le a-yv v-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi, na-s-gi v-qua-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di-yi a-gi-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi, a-gi-s-du-i-s-di-yi tsi-o-li ni-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na, gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-quv-ne-di-yi u-de-li-dv ge-sv o-s-dv ka-ne-he-dv;

100620.english: For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.
100620.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ] ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎥᏆᎸᎢᏛ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎠᎩᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏯᎩᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ.
100620.phonetic: Na-s-gi [o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv] tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yv v-gi-nv-si-dv v-qua-lv-i-dv tsi-gi; na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi na-hna-ni ni-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na a-gi-ne-i-s-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya i-ya-gi-we-s-di-yi tsi-du-yu-go-di.

100621.english: But that ye also may know my affairs, and how I do, Tychicus, a beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord, shall make known to you all things:
100621.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏕᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏆᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ, ᏗᎩᎦ, ᎣᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏨᏁᎵ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ;
100621.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi na-s-quo a-yv na-qua-li-s-da-ne-li-de-gv a-le na-qua-dv-hna-de-gv-i, Di-gi-ga, o-tsi-ge-yu-i o-tsa-li-nv-tli a-le o-s-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li, gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-tsv-ne-li nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di;

100622.english: Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that ye might know our affairs, and that he might comfort your hearts.
100622.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏅᎵ ᏗᏤᎲᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏃᎦᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏕᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ.
100622.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-nv-li di-tse-hv-i na-s-gi-quo u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi no-ga-li-s-da-ne-li-de-gv-i, a-le na-s-gi tsu-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di-yi di-tsi-na-wi.

100623.english: Peace be to the brethren, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
100623.cherokee: ᎤᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏚᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
100623.phonetic: U-wa-do-hi-ya-dv du-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di a-na-li-nv-tli, a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i, nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

100624.english: Grace be with all them that love our Lord Jesus Christ in sincerity. Amen.
100624.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏄᎾᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᏂᎨᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
100624.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv du-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di na-ni-v nu-na-tlo-na-s-dv-na u-ni-ge-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.  E-me-nv.
